subject: biology
title: 21N.1.SL.TZ0.17
question_html:
What is exchanged between a sealed mesocosm and the surrounding external environment?

A. Energy

B. Water

C. Air

D. Nothing can pass
examiners_html: This question had the lowest discrimination index on the paper so some well-prepared candidates must have answered it incorrectly. More than half of candidates thought that nothing can pass in or out of a sealed mesocosm, forgetting that energy will almost certainly be able to pass in or out in the form of heat and probably also in as light. In terms of thermodynamics, a closed system exchanges energy but not matter with its environment.
